summary: Long-Term Investing System (P1) fully verified. All 8 backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend /long-term page renders with summary strip, bucket bars, tabs (Portfolio, Recommendations, Universe), Stage Buy modal, and Thesis Health modal. Full CRUD workflow tested: stage-buy → verify in portfolio → thesis health → close position.

backend_tests.auth_access: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
backend_tests.lt_endpoints_require_auth: PASS - All 8 LT endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
backend_tests.portfolio_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/lt-invest/portfolio returns summary, positions, bucket_breakdown
backend_tests.universe_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/lt-invest/universe returns core (9 ETFs), quality_growth (25), opportunistic_value (20)
backend_tests.stage_buy_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/lt-invest/stage-buy allows adding VOO to core bucket (2 shares, $450)
backend_tests.stage_buy_validation: PASS - Stage buy validates required fields (symbol, bucket, shares, price)
backend_tests.thesis_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/lt-invest/thesis/{symbol} returns thesis health with score, status, recommendation
backend_tests.rebalance_check_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/lt-invest/rebalance-check returns needs_rebalance, reasons, bucket_allocation
backend_tests.full_crud_workflow: PASS - Complete workflow: stage-buy → verify in portfolio → thesis → close

frontend_tests.access_gate: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
frontend_tests.long_term_page_load: PASS - /long-term page loads with Long-Term Portfolio header
frontend_tests.summary_strip: PASS - Summary strip shows Total Value, P&L, Positions, Diversification ring, Rebalance status
frontend_tests.bucket_bars: PASS - All 3 bucket bars visible (Core, Quality Growth, Opportunistic Value) with allocation % and target ranges
frontend_tests.tabs_visible: PASS - Portfolio, Recommendations, Universe tabs all visible
frontend_tests.recommendations_tab: PASS - Recommendations tab shows 31 recommendation cards with action badges (BUY, ADD, TRIM)
frontend_tests.universe_tab: PASS - Universe tab shows searchable stock/ETF universe organized by bucket (Core ETFs 9, Quality Growth 25, Opportunistic Value 20)
frontend_tests.stage_buy_modal: PASS - Stage Buy modal opens with Shares, Price, Thesis inputs and Submit button
frontend_tests.stage_buy_submission: PASS - Stage Buy form submission creates position in portfolio
frontend_tests.thesis_modal: PASS - Clicking position row opens Thesis Health modal with score (50/100), status (neutral), recommendation (HOLD)
frontend_tests.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button visible and clickable
frontend_tests.diversification_ring: PASS - Diversification ring displays score (26 after adding position)

features_verified: Access gate login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7
/api/lt-invest/portfolio returns proper portfolio summary with bucket_breakdown
/api/lt-invest/universe returns core (9 ETFs), quality_growth (25 stocks), opportunistic_value (20 stocks)
/api/lt-invest/stage-buy allows adding a position (VOO, core bucket, 2 shares, $450)
/api/lt-invest/thesis/{symbol} returns thesis health for a position
Frontend Long-Term page renders at /long-term with summary strip, bucket bars, and tabs
Frontend Recommendations tab shows recommendation cards with action badges
Frontend Universe tab shows searchable stock/ETF universe organized by bucket
Frontend Stage Buy modal opens and allows entering shares/price/thesis
Frontend Thesis modal opens when clicking a position row
critical_code_review_comments: LongTermInvestingEngine correctly implements 3-bucket portfolio management (Core, Quality Growth, Opportunistic Value)
Staged buying (25% chunks) properly tracks stage 1-4 progression
Diversification scoring algorithm considers position count, bucket balance, concentration, and asset type mix
Rebalance check correctly identifies allocation drift and timing-based rebalancing needs
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
All API calls use proper Authorization header with Bearer token
seed_data_creation: Test position VOO created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Long-Term Investing System (P1) fully verified. All 8 backend endpoints working. Frontend /long-term page fully functional with summary strip, bucket bars, tabs, Stage Buy modal, and Thesis Health modal. Test position VOO was created during testing and cleaned up. Previous iterations 33-35 tested other features (strategy, top movers, analytics). The LT system is completely separate from the existing Trading/Investments tabs and stores positions in MongoDB collection 'lt_portfolio'.
